title: Zephyr gateway: BLE UART interface
description: Add a BLE GATT UART service to the gateway firmware as a phone-friendly alternative to wired serial SLIP. Implement the Nordic UART Service (NUS) profile: two characteristics, TX and RX, each 20-byte MTU extendable via BT_GATT_ATT_MTU. Frame IPv6 packets over BLE UART using the same SLIP encoding as the wired interface so the client stack is identical regardless of transport. The nucleo_wl55jc board does not have a BLE radio — gate this behind CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE and plan to enable it on an nRF52840 dongle.
acceptance_criteria: BLE UART characteristic is discoverable; a connected client can send SLIP-framed packets to the mesh and receive responses; compiles on native_sim without BLE hardware
close_reason: NUS GATT service with SLIP framing implemented in ble_uart.h/ble_uart.c; CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE gates compilation on boards without BLE radio; wired into gateway main.c.
